title: wolfhsm-sys shims: silent u16 truncation of buffer sizes
description: wolfhsm_ecc_shared_secret(), wolfhsm_curve25519_shared_secret(), and wolfhsm_rsa_sign() cast uint32_t out_len to uint16_t with no overflow check. For RSA with a 4096-bit key, out_len could plausibly be 512 bytes (fits fine), but a caller passing a larger buffer would get silent truncation. More importantly, in_len is cast to uint16_t in wolfhsm_rsa_sign via '(uint16_t)in_len', which silently truncates any input > 64KiB. Add explicit bounds checks and return an error code rather than silently truncating.
